# Research

## Work in Progress

::: {.research-card}
#### Decoding Grades
:::

::: {.research-card}
#### Negotiating Informality: Bargaining Practices and Preferences of Domestic Workers

<div class="meta">with Irene Solmone</div>
:::


## Past Projects

::: {.research-card}
#### Holding Back Retention: The Effect of Learning Cycles on Enrollment and Student Achievement in Brazil

<div class="paper-links">
[Three Minute Presentation (Master SynThesis Competition Winner, Columbia University)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YCkabsRkzeA&list=PLkULRX51Q4q_9ZphSM5Jo560Vj0VQKAv5&index=1&pp=iAQB)
</div>
:::

## Dissemination

::: {.research-card}
#### ¿Es la repetición de curso efectiva y equitativa en España?

<div class="meta">with Eva Flavia Martínez Orbegozo — Book chapter for *La desigualdad en España*, Lengua de Trapo (2024)</div>
:::
